chemicalDescription: Xanthophylls is a class of oxygen-containing carotenoids found throughout nature particularly in plant leaves, egg yolks, nettles, algae and the petals of yellow flowers.
Propolis Wax is the material obtained from the extraction of propolis, a resinous substance found in beehives.

3-Amino-2,6-Dimethylphenol is the organic compound

Tripeptide-49 Oligopeptide-91 Dipeptide-19 r-Bovine Octapeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from r-Bovine Octapeptide-1, Tripeptide-49, Oligopeptide-91 and Dipeptide-19. The fused peptide contains 34 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Rosa Gallica Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Rosa gallica grown in culture, Rosaceae.
Fructosyl Cocoate/Olivate is the product obtained by the reaction of Fructose (q.v.) with coconut acid chloride and olive acid chloride.
Ribes Rubrum (Currant) Fruit Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the fruit of Ribes rubrum, Grossulariaceae.

Esters (Includes only esters not otherwise classified as alkoxylated carboxylic acids, glyceryl esters, isethionates, lanolin derivatives, phosphorus compounds, sulfosuccinates or sulfuric acid esters)
Pentapeptide-36 is a synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, glycine and lysine.

Acryloyl Dimethyl Taurate/Melamine/PEG-6 Methacrylate/Phloroglucinol Crosspolymer is is a complex, crosslinked polymer that is made by reacting Phloroglucinol with Glutaral (q.v. MID 1074) followed by the reaction with 2-acrylamido-2-methylpropane sulfonic acid and PEG-6 methacrylate. The resulting polymer is then further reacted with melamine.
Polygonum Multiflorum Callus Extract is the extract of a callus of Polygonum Multiflorum grown in culture, Polygonaceae.
Defatted Viburnum Opulus Flower is the dried, defatted flowers of Viburnum opulus, Caprifoliaceae.
Defatted Opuntia Ficus-Indica Flower is the dried, defatted flowers of Opuntia ficus-indica.
Decapeptide-34 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, asparagine, aspartic acid, glycine, leucine, serine and valine.
Nicotiana Tabacum Flower oil is an essential oil obtained from the flowers of the Tobacco, Nicotiana tabacum L., Solanaceae

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Schizosaccharomyces/(Solanum Lycopersicum/Cucumis Sativus/Ananas Comosus/Citrus Limon/Pyrus Malus/Cucurbita Maxima/Carica Papaya/Citrullus Lanatus/Cucumis Melo/Prunus Armeniaca/Amygdalus Persica/Ficus Carica/Akebia Quinata/Chaenomeles Sinensis/Fragaria Annanassa/Vitis Vinifera/Actinidia Deliciosa/Prunus Mume/Eriobotyra Japonica/Prunus Salicina/Benincasa Hispida) Fruit/(Raphanus Sativus/Brassica Oleracea Capitata/Daucus Carota/Aloe Arborescens/Sasa Veitchii/Diospyros Kaki/Perilla Frutescens) Leaf/(Raphanus Sativus/Daucus Carota/Solanum Tuberosum/Ipomoea Batatas/Colocasia Esculenta/Nelumbo Nucifera/Arctium Lappa/Dioscorea Japonica/Zingiber Officinale) Root/(Glycine Max/Vigna Angularis/Coix Lacryma-Jobi Ma-yuen/Setaria Italica/Panicum Miliaceum) Seed/Farfugium Japonicum Stem/Equisetum Arvense/Oenanthe Javanica/Cryptotaenia Japonica/Oryza Sativa/Lentinus Edodes Fruiting Body/Undaria Pinnatifida Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: This is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the fruit of Solanum lycopersicum, Cucumis sativus, Ananas comosus, Citrus limon, Pyrus malus, Cucurbita maxima, Carica papaya, Citrullus lanatus, Cucumis melo, Prunus armeniaca, Amygdalus persica, Ficus carica, Akebia quinata, Chaenomeles sinensis, Fragaria annanassa, Vitis vinifera, Actinidia deliciosa, Prunus mume, Eriobotyra japonica, Prunus salicina , and Benincasa Hispida ; the leaves of Raphanus sativus, Brassica oleracea capitata, Daucus carota, Aloe arborescens, Sasa veitchii, Diospyros kaki , and Perilla frutescens ; the roots of Raphanus Sativus, Daucus carota, Solanum tuberosum, Ipomoea batatas, Colocasia esculenta, Nelumbo nucifera, Arctium lappa, Dioscorea japonica , and Zingiber officinale ; the seeds of Glycine max, Vigna angularis. Coix lacryma-jobi ma-yuen, Setaria italica ,and Panicum miliaceum ; the stems of Farfugium japonicum , the whole plants, Oenanthe javanica, Cryptotaenia japonica, Oryza sativa ; the fruiting body of Lentinus edodes and the alga, Undaria pinnatifida by the microorganism, Schizosaccnaromyces.
inciName: SCHIZOSACCHAROMYCES/(SOLANUM LYCOPERSICUM/CUCUMIS SATIVUS/ANANAS COMOSUS/CITRUS LIMON/PYRUS MALUS/CUCURBITA MAXIMA/CARICA PAPAYA/CITRULLUS LANATUS/CUCUMIS MELO/PRUNUS ARMENIACA/AMYGDALUS PERSICA/FICUS CARICA/AKEBIA QUINATA/CHAENOMELES SINENSIS/FRAGARIA ANNANASSA/VITIS VINIFERA/ACTINIDIA DELICIOSA/PRUNUS MUME/ERIOBOTYRA JAPONICA/PRUNUS SALICINA/BENINCASA HISPIDA) FRUIT/(RAPHANUS SATIVUS/BRASSICA OLERACEA CAPITATA/DAUCUS CAROTA/ALOE ARBORESCENS/SASA VEITCHII/DIOSPYROS KAKI/PERILLA FRUTESCENS) LEAF/(RAPHANUS SATIVUS/DAUCUS CAROTA/SOLANUM TUBEROSUM/IPOMOEA BATATAS/COLOCASIA ESCULENTA/NELUMBO NUCIFERA/ARCTIUM LAPPA/DIOSCOREA JAPONICA/ZINGIBER OFFICINALE) ROOT/(GLYCINE MAX/VIGNA ANGULARIS/COIX LACRYMA-JOBI MA-YUEN/SETARIA ITALICA/PANICUM MILIACEUM) SEED/FARFUGIUM JAPONICUM STEM/EQUISETUM ARVENSE/OENANTHE JAVANICA/CRYPTOTAENIA JAPONICA/ORYZA SATIVA/LENTINUS EDODES FRUITING BODY/UNDARIA PINNATIFIDA FERMENT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription:
Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower/Leaf/Stem Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the flowers, leaves, and stems of Lavandula angustifolia,
Lamiaceae.

sh-Polypeptide-60 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E.Coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Superoxide Dismutase 1 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 154 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Artocarpus Altilis Wood Extract is the extract of Artocarpus Altilis Wood, Moraceae.
Acetyl Dipeptide-32 Amide is the product obtained by the acetylation of Dipeptide-32 in which the C-terminus is an amide.

Methacryloyloxypropyl Polysilsesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the methacryloxypropyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Methacryloyloxypropyl Polysilsesquioxane is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of Methacryloyl Propyltrimethoxysilane
Cryptomeria Japonica Branch/Leaf Extract is the extract of the branches and leaves of  Cryptomeria japonica, Cupressaceae.

Thuja Orientalis Branch/Leaf Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground branches and leaves of  Thuja orientalis.  The accepted scientific name for  Thuja orientalis  is  Platycladus orientalis, Cupressaceae.
Coprosma Grandifolia Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of  Coprosma grandifolia, Rubiaceae.
Opuntia Stricta Seed Oil is the fixed oil expressed from the seeds of  Opuntia stricta, Cactaceae.
Caviar Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates derived from the eggs of the sturgeon, Acipenser.
Acrylic Acid/Ethyltrimonium Chloride Methacrylate Copolymer is a copolymer of Acrylic Acid and 2-(trimethylammonium) ethyl methacrylate chloride.

Polyacrylate Crosspolymer-10 is the crosslinked polymer prepared by polymerizing a mixture of trimethoxysilylpropylmethacrylate with trimethyloylpropane trimethacrylate.
Polyester-25 is a copolymer of adipic acid, and methylpropanediol end-capped with methoxycrylene or octyldodecanol.

chemicalDescription: rh-Polypeptide-79 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Peroxiredoxin-1 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 199 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

It contains a maximum of 102 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

chemicalDescription: Chlorophyllin-Copper Complex is obtained from chlorophyll by replacing the methyl and phytyl ester groups with alkali and replacing the magnesium with copper.  To identify the colorant meeting the requirements for labeling purposes in the US, the INCI Name Chlorophyllin-Copper Complex must be used.  To identify the colorant allowed for use in the European Union (EU), the INCI Name CI 75810 must be used.

sh-Octapeptide-6 SP is a single chain human peptide, produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, 40S ribosomal protein S3, and contains 8 amino acids consisting of glycine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine, methionine and valine. The parent protein contains a maximum of 243 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

r-(sh-Polypeptide-62 Decapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes encoding for sh-Polypeptide-62 and Decapeptide-40. The fusion peptide contains 707 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Cilostamide is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:

sr-(Methionyl sh-Polypeptide-131 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from sh-Polypeptide-131, Dipeptide-19 and Hexapeptide-40 with the initiation code for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 174 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Tetrapeptide-76 is a synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, cysteine, leucine and lysine.
Fruit Fly Larva Oil is the oil derived from the larva of Ceratitis capitata , commonly known as the Mediterranean fruit fly or medfly.
Hydrolyzed Euphausia Superba Oil is the oil produced from the hydrolysis of Euphausia superba by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
Methoxyphenylimino Dimethylcyclohexene Glycine is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:

Galloyl Pentapeptide-74 is the product obtained by the reaction of Gallic Acid and Pentapeptide-74.

Oligopeptide-197 is the synthetic peptide containing 22 amino acids consisting of alanine, arginine, asparagine, aspartic acid, cysteine, glutamic acid, glutamine, glycine, leucine, methionine, proline, threonine and tryptophan.
Starch/Acrylates Crosspolymer is a polymer of starch and acrylic acid, methacrylic acid or one of their simple esters, crosslinked with Trimethylolpropane Triacrylate.
Hydrilla Verticillata Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Hydrilla verticillata.
Ocotea Aciphylla Leaf Oil is the volatile oil derived from the leaves of Ocotea aciphylla.

(Broccoli/Cabbage/Eruca Sativa/Radish) Sprout/Moringa Oleifera Leaf Extract is the extract of the sprouts of Brassica oleracea italica, Brassica oleracea capitata, Eruca sativa and Raphanus sativa; and the leaves of Moringa oleifera.
Persicaria Hydropiper Sprout Extract is the extract of the sprouts of Persicaria hydropiper.
Gerotine/Hydrolyzed DNA is the complex formed between Gerotine and Hydrolyzed DNA.

r-(sh-Polypeptide-22 Decapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes encoding for sh-Polypeptide-22 and Decapeptide-40. The fusion peptide contains 122 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: HUMAN CORD BLOOD PROGENITOR CELL EXOSOMES
chemicalDescription: Human Cord Blood Progenitor Cell Exosomes are vesicles that are secreted into the conditioned media by human cord blood progenitor cells.

chemicalDescription: C9-20 Isoalkane is a mixture of branched and linear alkanes with 9 to 20 carbon atoms in the alkyl chain.

Heptapeptide-53 Amide is the synthetic peptide containing 7 amino acids in which the C-terminus of the peptide is an amide, and consists of asparagine, phenylalanine, proline, serine, tyrosine, threonine and tryptophan.

chemicalName: DNA aptamer, d(C-G-A-A-C-A-G-C-A-T-G-G-A-G-GC- G-C-G-C-C-C-G-T-T-G-T-G-C-C-G-T-G-C), synthetic reduced glutathione-binding Aptamin G1
chemicalDescription: s-DNA Aptamer-3 is a single stranded DNA molecule produced synthetically that folds into a well-defined three-dimensional structure containing 34 nucleotides. It shows a high affinity and specificity for a target molecule, glutathione.

chemicalName: DNA aptamer, d(C-G-A-G-T-G-A-A-C-G-A-C-G-A-GG- C-G-C-G-T-C-A-C-A-C-T-G-C-G), synthetic reduced glutathione-binding Aptamin G4
chemicalDescription: s-DNA Aptamer-4 is a single stranded DNA molecule produced synthetically that folds into a well-defined three-dimensional structure containing 30 nucleotides. It shows a high affinity and specificity for a target molecule, glutathione.

Aspergillus/Saccharomyes/Ipomoea Batatas Root Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the fermentation product of the roots of Ipomoea batatas by the microorgansms, Aspergillus and Saccharomyces cerevisiae

Acetyl Carboxymethyl Cocoyl Glycine is the product obtained by the reaction of coconut acid chloride, glycine and chloroacetic acid.
Abies Pectinata Needle Oil is the essential oil obtained from the needles of the fir, Abies pectinata, Pinacea. Syn. Abies alba Miller

chemicalDescription: "Citronella Oil (Sri Lanka)". Cymbopogon Nardus Herb Oil is an essential oil obtained from the herbs of the plant, Cymbopogon (syn: Andropogon) nardus (L.), Gramineae. The Ceylon citronella oil contains geraniol (about 60%), citronellal (about 15%), camphene, limonene, linalool, borneol. The Java citronella oil contains 25-50% citronellal, 25-45% geraniol
Pinus Mugo Twig Leaf Extract is an extract obtained from the twigs leaves of the Pine, Pinus mugo, Pinaceae

rh-Polypeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Basic Fibroblast Growth Factor. It contains a maximum of 210 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the standard amino acids. DIPA-Myristate is the diisopropanolamine salt of Myristic Acid
Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Flower/Leaf/Stem Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground flowers, leaves and stems of Sweet Orange, Citrus aurantium L. var. dulcis L., Rutaceae

"Lime Oil". Citrus Aurantifolia Peel Oil Distilled is an essential oil distilled from the acidic epicarps after the pressing the juice from the fruit of the Lime, Citrus aurantifolia, Rutaceae. It contains mainly D-limonene and 7% alpha-terpineol
